Metadata.siteTitle: K.K Edilizia | Renovations and Construction in Modena
Metadata.siteDescription: Looking for a building contractor in Modena? K.K Edilizia specializes in turnkey renovations, drywall and painting in Modena and province. Contact us for a quote.
Metadata.contactsDescription: Phone, email, PEC and Modena office. Construction and renovations across the province (Sassuolo, Carpi, Formigine). Message form and online quote.

Hero.subtitle: Turnkey renovations, construction, and finishes in Modena and province — including Sassuolo, Carpi, and Formigine. One team for reliable timelines and attention to detail.

Services.label: What we do
Services.title: Full service, one point of contact
Services.intro: From demolition to handover: we plan phases, manage suppliers, and keep you updated on progress and timing.
Services.r1d: Apartments and houses, systems and finishes with a single coordinator.
Services.r2d: Restoration, façades, and structural work with proper certifications.
Services.r3d: Layouts, materials, and site visits for a coherent result.
Services.r4d: Flooring, painting, and details that define the look.

ProcessSteps.label: After the site visit
ProcessSteps.title: How we work, step by step
ProcessSteps.intro: Transparency on what happens after the first site visit, so you know what to expect before signing.
ProcessSteps.s1d: Gathering requirements, inspecting the space, and initial technical checks.
ProcessSteps.s2d: A proposal with line items, indicative materials, and a schedule.
ProcessSteps.s3d: Contract, site planning, and supplier orders.
ProcessSteps.s4d: Work with regular updates, testing, and documented handover.

CostEstimator.title: Indicative cost estimate
CostEstimator.intro: Enter square metres and type of work: get a rough budget range to plan ahead. No data is sent to the server.
CostEstimator.li1: Useful to compare budget bands before a site visit.
CostEstimator.li2: A binding quote comes after an on-site assessment.
CostEstimator.rangeEmpty: Enter a valid area to see the estimate.
CostEstimator.disclaimer: Market averages only, not an offer. Access, condition, and finishes change the final quote.

HomeStimaTeaser.title: Indicative cost estimate
HomeStimaTeaser.body: Get a rough budget range from square metres and type of work—before a site visit.

StimaCostiPage.metaDescription: Rough budget range for renovations and building work. No data sent to the server.

FeaturedProjects.label: Portfolio
FeaturedProjects.title: Recent projects
FeaturedProjects.intro: A selection of residential renovations, construction, and commercial spaces.

Reviews.label: Reviews
Reviews.title: What clients say
Reviews.intro: Feedback from clients who chose K.K Edilizia for sites in Modena and province (demo text).
Reviews.r1: Clean site, deadlines met, and one contact—finally clarity.
Reviews.r2: Detailed quote and no mid-project surprises. Recommended.
Reviews.r3: Great coordination between masons and MEP. Result beyond expectations.

FaqSection.label: FAQ
FaqSection.title: Common questions
FaqSection.intro: Clarity on timing, process, and site organisation—before the final quote.

CtaBanner.title: Ready to start?
CtaBanner.subtitle: Tell us about your project: we’ll reply with next steps and, if needed, schedule a site visit.

Footer.tagline: Renovations and construction in {area}. Quality, clear timelines, and organised sites.
Footer.napAreas: We work in Modena and province: Sassuolo, Carpi, Formigine, and surrounding towns.

Booking.metaDescription: Request a site visit in Modena and province—we’ll contact you to agree a date and time.
Booking.label: Appointments
Booking.title: Book a site visit
Booking.intro: Submit the form: you’ll get a confirmation email and we’ll contact you to schedule the visit. No paid third-party booking tool required.
Booking.formPrivacy: Your data is processed as described in our
Booking.fieldAddressHint: Helps us plan travel in Modena and surrounding areas.
Booking.fieldPreferred: When would you like the visit?
Booking.fieldPreferredHint: Pick a preferred date and time—we’ll confirm together after we reach out.
Booking.attachmentsHint: Up to 5 files: JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, or PDF. Max 2 MB per file, 4 MB total.
Booking.successBody: We’ve sent a short confirmation to your inbox. We’ll get back to you soon.
Booking.errorGeneric: Could not send. Please try again shortly.
Booking.errorConfig: Email is not configured on the server (Gmail or Resend).

PortfolioPage.label: Our work
PortfolioPage.title: Portfolio
PortfolioPage.intro: A selection of completed sites. Every project gets the same care for detail and agreed timelines.
PortfolioPage.beforeAfterHint: Drag the slider to compare (demo photos from the web).

ProjectDetail.similar: Need something similar? Tell us about your project.
ProjectDetail.virtualTourCardHint: 360° view of this project (images live under public/virtual-tour/projects/…).
ProjectDetail.virtualTourIntro: Drag to look around and use the arrows to move between rooms. Equirectangular images are stored in this project’s folder under public/.

VirtualTour.viewerErrorImages: Panorama images are missing or could not be loaded. Check files under public/virtual-tour/projects/… and paths in projects.ts.
VirtualTour.viewerErrorGeneric: Something went wrong while starting the viewer. Try reloading the page.

CookieBanner.title: Cookies & transparency
CookieBanner.text: We use strictly necessary cookies; visits are measured in aggregate with Vercel Web Analytics. More information in our
CookieBanner.hint: You can record your choice below (stored locally).

ContactForm.successBody: We’ve sent a short confirmation to your inbox. The office receives your message and any attachments.
ContactForm.attachmentsHint: Up to 5 files: JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, or PDF. Max 2 MB per file, 4 MB total.

FormErrors.attachmentFileTooLarge: One or more files exceed 2 MB. Choose smaller files.
FormErrors.attachmentInvalidType: Only images (JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF) and PDF are allowed.
FormErrors.attachmentTotalTooLarge: Total attachment size exceeds 4 MB. Remove or compress some files.
FormErrors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please try again in about a minute.
FormErrors.emailSendFailed: Could not send the email. If using Gmail: use a 16-character app password (no spaces), enable 2-Step Verification, and restart the server after saving .env.local. Check the server terminal for the SMTP error.
FormErrors.emailNotConfigured: Email sending is not configured on the server: set up Gmail or Resend (see .env.example).
FormErrors.genericSubmit: Something went wrong. Please try again shortly.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.text: The page you’re looking for doesn’t exist or has been moved.
